title: Default Files
body:
Default files, unofficial fork of [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr).

This mod has one simple function, to provide default options if the corresponding option file doesn't exist.

### Example 1 (options.txt)
Create /config/default_files/options.txt Put default content in it Launch game! YOSBR will copy /config/default_files/options.txt into /options.txt if it doesn't exist

### Example 2 (config/roughlyenoughitems/config.json5)
Create /config/default_files/config/roughlyenoughitems/config.json5 Put default content in it Launch game! YOSBR will copy /config/default_files/config/roughlyenoughitems/config.json5 into /config/roughlyenoughitems/config.json5 if it doesn't exist
